# comfyui_save_glb (Resource)

ComfyUI SaveGLB node — Save 3D Model [3d] Hidden runtime inputs: prompt (PROMPT), extra_pnginfo (EXTRA_PNGINFO). Source: comfy_extras/nodes_hunyuan3d.py:616 (v3_extras).

## Schema

### Required
